body.title: Research to Draft
body.description: A three-step workflow for producing research-backed written content.

steps.title: Research
steps.instruction: Gather information on the topic from at least 3 primary sources.
steps.on_complete: Confirm research is complete before proceeding to draft.

steps.title: Draft
steps.instruction: Write a first draft using the research gathered in step 1.

steps.title: Fact-check
steps.instruction: Review every factual claim in the draft and verify against sources.
